consider.reason: Facet manifests can affect command inventory and ownership reports.

commands.name: agent_check
commands.purpose: Validate skill routing, doc references, and Facet-backed command inventory.

commands.name: pyext-build
commands.purpose: Compile typed Python modules with mypyc into package-shaped musl CPython extensions under build/mypyc/$REPO_ARCH/ from source paths or pyext.toml.

commands.name: lint
commands.purpose: Run repo quality lint checks, using pinned tools when available and stdlib fallbacks for syntax checks.

commands.name: test
commands.purpose: Run unittest discovery and optional coverage threshold checks.

commands.name: verify-reproducibility
commands.purpose: Verify bootstrap specs carry version and integrity pins.
